title: Data-at-Rest & In-Transit Encryption
description: Implement Envelope Encryption with KMS-backed key rotation to protect PII at rest. Implement Mutual TLS (mTLS) for secure, zero-trust service-to-service communication. Distinguish between and apply appropriate encryption strategies for data at rest and in transit.
objectives: Implement Envelope Encryption with KMS-backed key rotation to protect PII at rest.
Implement Mutual TLS (mTLS) for secure, zero-trust service-to-service communication.
Distinguish between and apply appropriate encryption strategies for data at rest and in transit.
